channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Success uncertain, but Israelis continue to back ‘heroic’ war with Iran
item.description: Israeli public overwhelmingly supports war with Iran, rallying behind Netanyahu despite political divisions.

item.title: Ukraine, EU allies slam US decision to roll back Russia oil sanctions
item.description: Volodymyr Zelenskyy says move 'does not help peace' as Europe reels from soaring energy prices linked to Iran war.

item.title: Ukraine finds new role as protector of US, Gulf allies amid Iran war
item.description: Having abandoned Ukraine, the US has sought Kyiv's support in defence from Iranian drones.

item.title: Thousands march worldwide in solidarity with Palestine, Iran on al-Quds Day
item.description: Despite war, al-Quds Day marches in Tehran saw thousands protest, voicing anger against Israel and the US.

item.title: Air attack hits as Iran’s chief justice gives lives interview at rally
item.description: An air attack hit in Tehran as Iran’s chief justice gave lives interview at an al-Quds rally

item.title: US’s Hegseth claims new Iran Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei injured
item.description: Pete Hegseth's remarks come a day after Khamenei pledged to keep fighting in first statement since he was named leader.

item.title: IEA announces release of 400 million barrels of oil. But is it enough?
item.description: Global energy watchdog pledges largest release from oil reserves amid war on Iran. But is 'one-shot' tactic sufficient?

item.title: Four killed in US military plane crash in Iraq
item.description: Four killed in US military plane crash in Iraq

item.title: What’s happened in Gaza and the West Bank since the start of the Iran war?
item.description: Israel has closed the Rafah border crossing and Israeli settler attacks in the occupied West Bank have continued.

item.title: Dozens injured after missile attack hits northern Israel
item.description: A missile attack that hit a Palestinian community in northern Israel has injured dozens of people.
